scripts.build: pnpm run i18n:compile && tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.i18n:compile: lingui compile --namespace json && biome format --write src/locales/*/messages.json
scripts.check: tsc --noEmit && biome check . && pnpm run test && pnpm run test:dom && pnpm run test:integration && pnpm run test:conversion
scripts.test:e2e: playwright test tests/stress/ux-interactions.e2e.ts tests/stress/file-tree-create.e2e.ts tests/stress/file-tree-drag-to-root.e2e.ts tests/stress/file-tree-deselect-to-root.e2e.ts
